scripts.dev: npm --workspace @tietie/shared run build && npm-run-all --parallel dev:web dev:api
scripts.build: npm --workspace @tietie/shared run build && npm --workspace @tietie/api run build && npm --workspace @tietie/web run build
scripts.build:clients: npm run build:web && npm run build:pwa && npm run build:android && npm run build:mp-wechat
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @tietie/shared run build && npm --workspaces run typecheck
scripts.deploy:config: docker compose -p tietie --env-file deploy/.env -f docker-compose.prod.yml config
scripts.deploy:up: docker compose -p tietie --env-file deploy/.env -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --build
scripts.deploy:logs: docker compose -p tietie --env-file deploy/.env -f docker-compose.prod.yml logs -f api
scripts.deploy:down: docker compose -p tietie --env-file deploy/.env -f docker-compose.prod.yml down
